channel.title: GitHub Brainfuck Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Brainfuck in GitHub

item.title: kiddin9/OpenWrt_x86-r2s-r4s-r5s-N1
item.description: 一分钟在线定制编译 X86/64, NanoPi R2S R4S R5S R6S, 斐讯 Phicomm N1 K2P, 树莓派 Raspberry Pi, 香橙派 Orange Pi, 红米AX6, 小米AX3600, 小米AX9000, 红米AX6S 小米AX3200, 红米AC2100, 华硕ASUS, 网件NETGEAR 等主流软硬路由
